extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won the sprint in Messina using both his teammate's leadout and parasitically drafting BORA-hansgrohe's train in the final 500m.
tactical_patterns: GAVIRIA parasitically attached to BORA-hansgrohe leadout train final 500m when Quick Step positioning initially failed
Quick Step riders GAVIRIA and EWAN both boxed 400-500m out, requiring cross-road repositioning salvage

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: salvaged sprint win despite being fouled/boxed at 500m, shows composure under positional chaos
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: also fouled 500m out alongside teammate GAVIRIA, suggests Quick Step positioning error not individual
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: podiumed despite no visible leadout support, indicates independent sprint strength
rider_signals.MARECZKO Jakub: positive: second place finish, competitive in reduced bunch sprint
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: neutral: mentioned as present but finished down the order despite BORA train
rider_signals.PIBERNIK Luka: neutral: mistakenly celebrated thinking he won intermediate sprint lap early, mental error
